cells.rationale: Subtle security-invariant fix to a defense-in-depth shell lexer, closing a reachable command-substitution bypass without introducing false denies and keeping both byte-identical guard copies in sync — a hard opus gate; xhigh fits the named-root-cause, correctness-critical scope short of open-ended debugging.
